notes: Pinned ratchet floors that must not regress. The contract_test_count metric is the static declaration count produced by scripts/audit.mjs::countTests (matches /^\s*(it|test)\(/gm across git-tracked tests/**/*.test.* files), not the vitest runtime total; the audit uses the static count so the ratchet is deterministic without shelling into vitest. Advancement is an explicit commit action; HEAD~1 moving-window comparison is insufficient (docs-only commits between regression and audit would hide the regression). Close gates depend on this file, not on HEAD~1 alone. See specs/plans/phase-1-close-revised.md §Slice 26b and ADR-0002 Addendum A. Slice 44 (arc-close ceremony over Slices 41/42/43a/43b/43c — two-prong composition review per CLAUDE.md §Cross-slice composition review cadence + Check 26 generalization from hardcoded single-arc to ARC_CLOSE_GATES iteration): +7 static declarations in tests/contracts/artifact-backing-path-integrity.test.ts covering the new ARC_CLOSE_GATES / PHASE_2_P2_4_P2_5_ARC_LAST_SLICE exports + per-gate isolation (old arc satisfied + new arc in-progress + new arc closed with both prongs + Claude-prong-only red + plan-file-absent gate skip). No other ratchet surface advances in this ceremony commit (the ceremony lands two prong review files + convergent HIGH fold-ins but no new feature code). 924 → 931. Slice 45 (P2.6 real codex adapter — src/runtime/adapters/codex.ts + src/runtime/adapters/shared.ts extraction + dispatch-materializer.ts adapterName parameterization + Check 32 checkCodexSmokeFingerprint binding CC#P2-2 second-adapter evidence): +29 static declarations (post-Codex-Slice-45-fold-ins) — (a) 26 in tests/contracts/slice-45-codex-adapter.test.ts covering module shape (CODEX_EXECUTABLE, CODEX_NO_WRITE_FLAGS argv-constant invariants including -s/read-only contiguity, exact-length pin, forbidden --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox + --full-auto + --add-dir + -o/--output-last-message + -c/--config + -p/--profile absence per HIGH 2 fold-in, CODEX_FORBIDDEN_ARGV_TOKENS enumeration, exec subcommand ordering) + parseCodexStdout NDJSON parser branches (happy path, terminal agent_message semantics with interleaved reasoning, known-type allowlist acceptance, empty stdout rejection, malformed JSON rejection, missing thread.started / empty thread_id / missing turn.completed / missing agent_message / unknown item.type rejection, missing item.text rejection) + real-fixture parsing per HIGH 5 fold-in (happy-path-ok.jsonl real Codex 0.118.0 capture, turn-failed.jsonl failure-shape rejection, unknown top-level event rejection, malformed top-level event rejection) + cross-adapter DispatchResult shape parity; (b) 1 static declaration in tests/runner/codex-adapter-smoke.test.ts (dispatchCodex export sanity; the CODEX_SMOKE=1-gated e2e uses the (CODEX_SMOKE ? it : it.skip) wrapper that does not count under the ^\s*(it|test)\( regex); (c) 2 static declarations in tests/runner/codex-dispatch-roundtrip.test.ts (materializeDispatch export sanity + dispatch.* kinds adapter-agnostic sanity; the CODEX_SMOKE=1-gated e2e wrapper does not count). New audit Check 32 (checkCodexSmokeFingerprint) binds ADR-0007 CC#P2-2 second-adapter evidence (corrected from initial CC#P2-4 claim per Codex Slice 45 HIGH 1 fold-in; CC#P2-4 is session hooks, P2.7's deliverable) with adapter-surface-hash drift detection per HIGH 4 fold-in. New fingerprint tests/fixtures/codex-smoke/last-run.json (schema_version 2) binds adapter source hash + cli_version alongside commit_sha. New real JSONL fixtures tests/fixtures/codex-smoke/protocol/happy-path-ok.jsonl + turn-failed.jsonl per HIGH 5. parseCodexStdout extended with top-level event allowlist + explicit turn.failed/error rejection per HIGH 5. CODEX_FORBIDDEN_ARGV_TOKENS constant + exported for contract-test binding per HIGH 2. UPDATE_CODEX_FINGERPRINT gate added to codex-dispatch-roundtrip.test.ts per MED 3. codex --version shellout memoized per process lifetime per MED 1. SIGKILL grace-timer cleared on close/error per LOW 2. HIGH 3 (DispatchFn structured dispatcher refactor) deferred to a named Slice 45a with plan-file reopen trigger. 931 → 960. Slice 45a (P2.6 HIGH 3 fold-in — DispatchFn structured dispatcher refactor per `specs/plans/phase-2-implementation.md` §P2.6 Named follow-up slice 45a): +1 static declaration in tests/runner/runner-dispatch-adapter-identity.test.ts asserting that injecting a codex-shaped descriptor through DogfoodInvocation.dispatcher lands adapter.name='codex' on dispatch.started — catches the pre-refactor regression where the runner's materializer call site hardcoded adapterName: 'agent'. Change scope: `DispatchFn` type in src/runtime/runner.ts flipped from bare function to `{ adapterName: BuiltInAdapter; dispatch: (input) => Promise<DispatchResult> }` descriptor; resolveDispatcher wraps dispatchAgent in the descriptor with adapterName: 'agent'; the materializer call site pulls adapterName from the descriptor instead of a literal. No ADR amendment, no governance-surface movement, no ratchet loosening. 960 → 961. Slice 43c (P2.5 explore end-to-end fixture run — closes CC#P2-1 + CC#P2-2 simultaneously per ADR-0007 §Decision.1): +24 static declarations — (a) 14 in tests/runner/explore-e2e-parity.test.ts covering explore fixture Workflow + validateWorkflowKindPolicy parse, 5-step kind distribution, close-step artifact path binding, dispatch-step role + gate.pass vocabulary, sha256Hex canonical hex digest, normalizeExploreResult purity + idempotence, ISO-timestamp / UUID / receipt_id / run_id / sorted-keys normalization, golden sha256 existence + format, golden-matches-runner-placeholder binding, and the AGENT_SMOKE-gated real-subprocess end-to-end (`(AGENT_SMOKE ? describe : describe.skip)` — the `it(...)` inside the gated describe counts statically even when skipped at runtime); (b) 10 in tests/contracts/slice-43c-agent-smoke-fingerprint.test.ts covering Check 30 `checkAgentSmokeFingerprint` live-repo green/yellow, absent-file yellow, malformed-JSON red, non-object JSON red, missing commit_sha red, invalid-SHA-format red, malformed result_sha256 red, unresolvable commit red, non-ancestor-of-HEAD red, and valid-ancestor green. New audit Check 30 (`checkAgentSmokeFingerprint`) binds ADR-0007 CC#P2-2 CI-skip semantics at the governance surface; new golden fixture tests/fixtures/golden/explore/result.sha256 locks byte-shape parity on the close-step placeholder artifact; new tests/fixtures/agent-smoke/last-run.json fingerprint produced by the AGENT_SMOKE=1 run against claude CLI v2.1.117 binds commit 48bcab8 (Slice 43b) as the ancestor-of-HEAD proof point. 900 → 924. Slice 46 (P2.7a — session-hook scaffolding per `specs/plans/phase-2-implementation.md` §P2.7 first-half binding of ADR-0007 §Decision.1 CC#P2-4): +15 static declarations in tests/contracts/session-hooks-present.test.ts covering new audit Check 33 `checkSessionHooksPresent` across (a) green live-repo, (b) green synthetic-scaffold sanity, (c) red on missing SessionStart.sh, (d) red on missing SessionEnd.sh, (e) red on non-executable SessionStart.sh, (f) red on non-executable SessionEnd.sh, (g) red on SessionStart.sh that does not reference circuit-engine continuity, (h) red on SessionEnd.sh that does not reference circuit-engine continuity, (i) red on missing settings.json, (j) red on malformed settings.json, (k) red on settings.json with no SessionStart entries, (l) red on settings.json with no SessionEnd entries, (m) red on SessionStart matcher missing one of {startup, resume, clear, compact}, (n) red on settings.json pointing to a different SessionStart script path, (o) red on settings.json pointing to a different SessionEnd script path. New artifacts landed by this slice (audit-aware): .claude/hooks/SessionStart.sh (Bash hook that calls .circuit/bin/circuit-engine continuity status --json and renders pending-continuity banner to stdout for capture as additionalContext), .claude/hooks/SessionEnd.sh (Bash hook that calls continuity status and emits one-line summary to stderr at session end), .claude/settings.json (additive — preserves existing Stop hook for auto-handoff-guard.sh, adds SessionStart and SessionEnd entries), scripts/audit.mjs Check 33 + analyzeSessionHookEntries helper, scripts/audit.d.mts checkSessionHooksPresent type declaration. CC#P2-4 closes when this check is green AND the second-half binding (tests/runner/continuity-lifecycle.test.ts create→persist→resume→clear lifecycle integration test) lands at follow-up Slice 46b / P2.7b. 961 → 976. Slice 46b (P2.7b — continuity-lifecycle integration test per `specs/plans/phase-2-implementation.md` §P2.7 second-half binding of ADR-0007 §Decision.1 CC#P2-4): +12 static declarations in tests/runner/continuity-lifecycle.test.ts covering the engine's `continuity {save,status,resume,clear}` CLI surface across (a) status on a fresh empty project root reports selection=none with no index file, (b) save writes the index file with a populated pending_record entry, (c) save writes the record file at payload_rel with the round-tripped narrative, (d) status after save reports selection=pending_record + surfaces the saved narrative, (e) resume after save returns source=pending_record with the same record_id, (f) resume is non-destructive — status after resume still reports pending, (g) resume on empty project returns source=none with a "nothing to resume" message, (h) clear after save deletes the record file from disk + clears the index pending_record + reports cleared_pending_record=true with deleted_record_id matching, (i) status after clear reports selection=none with empty record, (j) clear is idempotent on empty project (cleared=true, deleted_record_id=null), (k) save twice replaces the index pending_record pointer without deleting the prior record file from disk (pinning save-replace-of-pointer semantics — clear is the only command that reaps record files), (l) the engine reports the `selection` (status) and `source` (resume) discriminant fields the SessionStart and SessionEnd hooks read from `--json` output (pinning the field-name surface so a hidden rename breaks loud here instead of silently downgrading the SessionStart banner). Tests invoke `.circuit/bin/circuit-engine` as real subprocesses against ephemeral mkdtempSync project roots scoped via `--project-root`; macOS `/var/folders` ↔ `/private/var/folders` aliasing collapsed via `realpathSync` on the temp root so absolute-path assertions against engine output (deleted_record_path) match. With Slice 46b green, ADR-0007 CC#P2-4 (session hooks + continuity lifecycle) advances from active — red to active — satisfied (per-criterion status per ADR-0007 §3 No-aggregate-scoring rule; Slice 47c forbidden-scalar-phrase fold-in). No ADR amendment, no governance-surface movement, no Codex challenger pass (CLAUDE.md §Hard invariants #6 scope does not apply — adds new contract suite strictly tightening surface, advances ratchet without governance-surface movement). 976 → 988. Metadata fields (schema_version, last_advanced_at, last_advanced_in_slice) are audit-enforced via validatePinnedRatchetFloorData; floor zero or negative is rejected (Codex HIGH-2 fold-in). Future slices raise the floor only as an explicit ratchet-advance act.
